name: Tabs
$molecule: Container with SIBLING-SET slot. Holds N TabsTrigger children, exactly one with active=true.
description: Tab-bar container with raised-tab pill toggle. Holds N TabsTrigger buttons; renderer enforces exactly-one-active.

variantConstraints.reason: Line variant only supports horizontal orientation.

exposedProps.name: children
exposedProps.$role: SIBLING-SET slot accepting N TabsTrigger instances — see slots[name=items] below.

slots.name: items
slots.$role: Sibling-set slot. Apollo v2 source emits 3 TabsTrigger children by default (1 active + 2 inactive).

constraint.$role: Exactly one TabsTrigger child has active=true at render time. Renderer enforces via click handler.

slots.$sp12Note: SP-12 candidate (v0.4.0): formalize sibling-set slot type. Current spec doesn't have INSTANCE_SET — only INSTANCE_SWAP (single instance). Tabs is the first PoC to need a sibling-set with cross-sibling constraints.

container.$paddingNote: Apollo v2 has no spacing token at 3px. Closest: spacing/1 (4) or spacing/0-5 (2). Source-DS audit candidate.

bindings.$tabsTriggerNotes: Active/inactive styling lives on the TabsTrigger child component. See $tabsTriggerStyling below for the captured bindings (extracted from walked TabsTrigger nodes inside the Tabs container).

$tabsTriggerStyling.$comment: TabsTrigger is its own sub-component. Walked inline via Tabs container codegen.

badge.geometry: h-5 (20×min-20) raw + spacing/1 padding-x + gap spacing/1

uses.name: TabsTrigger
uses.ref: Apollo v2 sub-component (defined inline in source)

tabsTriggerA11y.$renderer: Each TabsTrigger should be <button role='tab' aria-selected={active}>. Active panel id via aria-controls.

$new_audit_findings_from_step3.F23: NEW (MEDIUM). TabsTrigger active state is child-managed; parent Tabs doesn't propagate. Renderer enforces 'exactly one active' at runtime. Apollo could add a parent-level `value` or `selectedIndex` prop for explicit control.
$new_audit_findings_from_step3.F24: NEW (LOW). Line variant lacks Vertical orientation. variantConstraints captures.
$new_audit_findings_from_step3.F25: NEW (LOW). TabsTrigger likely has Hover/Focus/Disabled states unwalked in this PoC — Default-only sample-first.

$v0_4_0_candidates.SP-12: Sibling-set slot type (HIGH). Tabs.items slot needs INSTANCE_SET with `constraint.kind: exactly-one`. Different from INSTANCE_SWAP (single instance). Formalize in BUNDLE_SPEC v0.4.0.
